description: Closed-form a priori sample-size calculation: solve for required n given effect size, alpha, and target power.
rules: read-only: computes a number, mutates no external state
TEST selects the solver: t_ind, t_paired, t_one, anova, two_proportions, one_proportion, correlation, chi2, linear_regression
per-group tests (t_ind, two_proportions) return n PER GROUP; anova/chi2/regression return total n
effect size must be supplied on a defensible basis (SESOI > shrunk pilot > convention) - the script does not invent one
usage: Set TEST and the effect inputs it needs (EFFECT_SIZE, or PROP1/PROP2 for proportions; K_GROUPS for anova; DOF for chi2; DF_NUM for regression). Optional ALPHA (default 0.05), POWER (default 0.80), ALTERNATIVE, RATIO. Output: sample_size.json.
limitation: Closed-form only - no formula exists for GLMs, mixed models, or cluster designs; use the simulate_power perk for those. Returns analyzed n, not enrolled n (inflate separately for dropout).
